title: Dry Tonne Days
summary:
Main
The final Dry Market Monitor of the year focuses on tonne-day demand growth as a leading indicator for freight market evolution and an early signal for market direction at the start of next year. You can find further end-of-year insights on geopolitical and freight trends in our Annual Review . Image reference: unnamed.png | assets/2025-12-30_dry-tonne-days_img_unnamed_32552bcbd2cb.png
Dry bulk tonne-days reached record highs in 2025, exceeding previous historical peaks, up around 4% year on year and close to 9% compared with 2023, highlighting the role of distance-driven demand in supporting vessel utilisation.
